label: should_reject

submission.name: EVAL EDGE Empty Schema
submission.tagline: No inputs defined — the tool has nothing to parameterize on.
submission.description: Valid prompt, but input_schema is an empty list. A well-specified tool should have at least one input. Agents should request changes.
submission.system_prompt: Write a short inspirational message for a Monday morning sales stand-up. Keep it under 50 words, professional tone, no emoji.

notes: Empty schema — pipeline should flag 'no inputs' as a design issue; expect needs_changes or rejection.
